collectedData.name: trip_schedule
collectedData.purpose: Store trip dates, destinations, and packing status locally on device.

collectedData.name: reminder_schedule
collectedData.purpose: Create local departure reminders at 24 hours and 2 hours before each trip.

permissions.name: ohos.permission.PUBLISH_AGENT_REMINDER
permissions.purpose: Publish local departure reminders for upcoming trips.

permissions.name: ohos.permission.VIBRATE
permissions.purpose: Provide light vibration feedback for important reminder interactions.
